title: Simple Combat Log
description:
The most simple, lightweight, and efficient drag-and-drop plugin you can find for combat loggers!

This plugin will eleminate those who log out during a fight by setting off a countdown when players hit eachother.
body:
Simple Combat log introduces a feature to Minecraft when your players are annoyed after a coward logs out during a fight.

This plugin will put a stop to that, as when a player hits another player, a action bar countdown will start and reset every time the players hit each other.

If a player logs out during the timer, they are killed upon logging back in meaning your players can finally get justice.
